caption: The scene takes place in an office or committee room setting. In the initial frames, several people are seated around a table, including women in dark professional attire and a man wearing glasses and a dark suit. A bookshelf with green binders and a blue bin is visible in the background. As the video progresses, the focus shifts to a man in a grey suit and tie who is looking down at papers. Beside him, a red tote bag with a white graphic is resting on a surface. Each frame features a consistent overlay at the bottom containing the "ORCA" logo, the date "April 12, 2019", the text "House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs", and a green bar stating "S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage". The camera transitions from a wide shot of the group to a closer side profile of the man in the suit.
